title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A BEING LIKE YOU CAN'T WIN AGAINST ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Right back where it came from!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll remember you as a swordsman that held some skill.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you manage to survive, I'm the one that's gonna beat the memory of me into your skull!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Underworld King's three Blade Dragons dragons

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: With one swing,Even dragons are torn asunder!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 11 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
